---
title: Curriculum Vitae
description: "A full record of appointments, education, publications, teaching, and service."
updated: 06-09-2026
title-block-banner: "#844247"
freeze: false
engine: knitr
page-layout: full
toc: false
cv:
  pdf: "CV.pdf"
---

```{=html}
<div class="va-cv-actions">
  <a class="va-cv-download" href="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf`" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    Download CV (PDF) <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>
  </a>
</div>

<div class="va-cv-updated">
  <span class="lbl">Last updated:</span> `r format(as.Date(rmarkdown::metadata$updated, format="%m-%d-%Y"), "%B %d, %Y")`
</div>

<div class="va-cv-frame">
  <iframe src="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf`" title="Curriculum Vitae"></iframe>
</div>
```
